# TruffleHog path-exclusion regexes (matched against file paths).
# Defense-in-depth: even if the scan falls back to filesystem mode, these
# untracked/gitignored paths must never be read. They hold live local
# credentials and build output, not committed source.
(^|/)\.env$
(^|/)\.env\..*
(^|/)\.next/
(^|/)node_modules/
(^|/)contracts/lib/
